__rationale__: Passing fixture for WR-12: Transformation step specifies competent-cell type (chemical vs electro) and matches it to expected transformation efficiency target (≥ 10⁸ cfu/µg for high-throughput Golden Gate libraries; ≥ 10⁶ acceptable for routine cloning).
